title: Truth
contents: property | Armor class | 10 (15 with Mage Armor)
description | Deathless Nature | Advantage vs disease/poison, resistance to poison damage, advantage on death saves.
description | Adjust Density (PB/Long Rest) | Alter weight of a creature to hinder or enhance movement.
description | Fire Bolt (if known) | +6 to hit, 1d10 fire.
description | Magic Missile | 3 darts, 1d4+1 force each (auto-hit).
description | Magnify Gravity | 2d8 force (Str save DC 14 or speed reduced).
description | Arcane Recovery (1/Day) | Recover spell slots after short rest.

title: Sidon
contents: description | Halphas, Contracted Presence | Cannot be flanked. Advantage on Perception (sight/hearing).
description | Ostrumite-Core Handaxe | +5 to hit, 1d6+3 slashing (may deal lightning or force).
description | Manifest Strike (1 ME) | +1d8 force or thunder (once/turn).
description | Protection | Impose disadvantage on attack vs ally within 5 ft.
description | Guardian Intercept | Reduce damage by 1d10+3.

title: StoneGuard
contents: property | Damage Resistances | bludgeoning, piercing, slashing (while raging)
property | Senses | darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14
description | Dwarven Resilience | Advantage on saving throws against poison and resistance to poison damage.
description | Rage (2/Day) | As a bonus action StoneGuard enters a rage for 1 minute, gaining resistance to weapon damage and +2 melee damage.
description | Reckless Attack | StoneGuard can gain advantage on melee attacks this turn, but attacks against him have advantage until his next turn.
description | Warhammer | +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., 1d8+3 bludgeoning.
description | Spiked Armor | +5 to hit, 1d4+3 piercing (bonus action while raging).
description | Spiked Retribution | When hit by a creature within 5 ft. while raging, that creature takes 1d4 piercing damage.

title: Morien
contents: property | Senses | darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 15
description | Necrotic Resistance | Resistant to necrotic damage.
description | Sneak Attack | +2d6 once/turn with advantage or ally adjacent.
description | Cunning Action | Dash, Disengage, or Hide.
description | Blessing of the Raven Queen (1/Long Rest) | Teleport 30 ft.

title: Starling
contents: description | Bardic Inspiration (3/Long Rest) | Bonus action, d6.
description | Cutting Words | Reaction, subtract d6 from enemy roll.
description | Vicious Mockery | Wis save DC 14, 1d4 psychic + disadvantage.
description | Healing Word | Bonus action heal 1d4+4.

title: Astralos
contents: description | Opening Salvo | Free firearm attack at initiative.
description | Gunblade (Firearm) | +6 to hit, ranged attack.
description | Breath Weapon | 30-ft line, DC 13 Dex, 1d10 lightning.

title: Dominion Recruit
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid (Human or Dragonborn), Astryx Dominion Recruit
description | Green Soldier | When within 10 ft of a Dominion Captain or Warden, gains +1 to attack rolls.
description | Light Crossbow | +3 to hit, 1d8 piercing.

title: Dominion Archer
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid (Human or Dragonborn), Dominion Archer
description | Volley Training | If an ally attacked the same target this round, deal +1d4 damage.

title: Dominion Beast Handler
contents: description | Command Beast | As a bonus action the handler commands a controlled beast to make an attack.
description | Prototype Controller | The handler carries an Ostrumite signal rod used to maintain control over crystal-implanted beasts.
description | Whistle Command | One controlled beast moves up to its speed.

title: Dominion Captain
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid (Dragonborn), Astryx Dominion Officer
description | Tactical Command | Once per round an allied Dominion creature within 30 ft may make one attack when the captain hits a creature.
description | Shield Bash | +5 to hit, 1d6+3 bludgeoning and push 5 ft.

title: Dominion Soldier
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid (Dragonborn), Astryx Dominion Guard
description | Formation Guard | While within 5 ft of another Dominion ally, AC becomes 17.
description | Shield Bash | +4 to hit, 1d6+2 bludgeoning.

title: Crystalbound Dire Wolf
contents: description | Ostrumite Implant | A glowing crystal is embedded in the creature's forehead. If the creature takes 10 damage from a single attack to the head, the crystal shatters and the creature becomes uncontrolled.
description | Pack Hunter | Advantage on attacks if an ally is within 5 ft.
description | Bite | +5 to hit, 2d6+3 piercing. Target must succeed DC 13 STR save or fall prone.

title: Swarm of Rot Grubs
contents: subtitle | Medium Swarm of Tiny Beasts, Unaligned
property | Damage Resistances | bludgeoning, piercing, slashing
property | Condition Immunities | charmed, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, prone, restrained, stunned
property | Senses | blindsight 10 ft., passive Perception 6

description | Swarm | The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rot grub. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

description | Flesh Burrow | If the swarm hits a creature with Bites, that creature is infested by rot grubs. At the start of each of the infested creature's turns, it takes 1d6 piercing damage per swarm infesting it. Applying fire to the bite wound before the end of the target's next turn deals 1 fire damage to the target and kills these rot grubs. After this time, the grubs are too far under the skin to be burned. If a target infested by rot grubs ends its turn with 0 hit points, it dies as the grubs burrow into its heart and kill it.
description | Bites | +0 to hit, 2d6 piercing. If the target is a creature, it is infested by rot grubs.

title: Giant Vulture
contents: description | Keen Sight and Smell | The vulture has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.
description | Pack Tactics | The vulture has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
description | Multiattack | The vulture makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.

title: Giant Spider (Ostrumite-Controlled)
contents: property | Senses | blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 10
description | Spider Climb | The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
description | Web Sense | While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.
description | Web Walker | The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

description | Ostrumite Control Crystal | A shard of Ostrumite has been embedded into the spider's thorax allowing Dominion handlers to control it. If the beastmaster controlling it dies, the spider becomes feral and attacks the nearest creature.
description | Bite | +5 to hit, 1d8+3 piercing plus 2d8 poison damage. The target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking half poison damage on success.

description | Web (Recharge 5-6) | Ranged weapon attack +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft. The target is restrained by webbing (escape DC 12). The webbing can be attacked (AC 10; HP 5; vulnerable to fire; immune to bludgeoning).

title: Dominion Arcanist
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid (Dragonborn or Human), Astryx Dominion Mage
description | Ostrumite Focus | The arcanist carries a small Ostrumite focus crystal that enhances control magic.
description | Lunar Channel | Once per turn when the arcanist deals damage with a spell, it deals +1d4 radiant damage.
description | Arcane Bolt | +5 to hit, 2d8 force damage.
description | Moonflash (Recharge 5â€“6) | Creatures in a 10 ft burst must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be blinded until the start of their next turn and take 2d6 radiant damage.
description | Command Beast | One crystal-controlled beast within 30 ft may immediately move up to its speed.

title: Halphas’ Bound Archer
contents: description | Soulbound Form | When reduced to 0 HP, the archer collapses into green feathers.
description | Marked by the Pact | Deals +1d4 damage if you attacked the same target this turn.
description | Spectral Longbow | +5 to hit, 1d8+3 piercing.

title: Halphas’ Bound Dire Wolf
contents: description | Soulbound Form | When reduced to 0 HP, the wolf collapses into green feathers.
description | Pack Echo | Has advantage on attack rolls if you are within 5 ft of the target.
description | Bite | +5 to hit, 2d6+3 piercing. Target must succeed DC 13 STR save or fall prone.

title: Halphas’ Bound Soldier
contents: description | Soulbound Form | When reduced to 0 HP, the soldier collapses into green feathers.
description | Formation Echo | While within 5 ft of you, gains +1 AC.
description | Spectral Spear | +4 to hit, 1d8+2 piercing.
description | Shield Bash | +4 to hit, 1d6+2 bludgeoning.

title: Ironhide Mage Killer
contents: description | Spellbreaker Training | When a creature within 5 ft of the mage killer casts a spell, the mage killer can make one weapon attack against it as a reaction.
description | Dampening Strikes | A creature hit by the mage killer’s spear has disadvantage on the next concentration check it makes before the end of its next turn.
description | Spellbreak Spear | +4 to hit, 1d8+2 piercing plus 1d4 force.
description | Null Javelin | Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., 1d6+2 piercing. If the target is concentrating on a spell, it takes an extra 1d4 damage.

title: Dune Strider Raider
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid, Dune Strider Tribe
description | Skirmisher | After making an attack, the raider can move up to 10 ft. without provoking opportunity attacks.
description | Sandstep | The raider has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made in sandy or rocky terrain.
description | Curved Blade | +5 to hit, 1d6+3 slashing.
description | Light Javelin | Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft., 1d6+3 piercing.

title: Red Fang Harpoon Hunter
contents: subtitle | Medium Humanoid, Red Fang Tribe
description | Beast Handler | Allied beasts within 30 ft of the hunter have advantage on their first attack roll each combat.
description | Tethering Harpoon | On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be pulled 10 ft toward the hunter.
description | Harpoon | +4 to hit, 1d8+2 piercing. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be pulled 10 ft toward the hunter.
description | Hunting Knife | +4 to hit, 1d6+2 slashing.

title: Stonebreaker Gatebreaker
contents: description | Siege Momentum | If the gatebreaker moves at least 10 ft straight toward a creature and then hits it with a hammer attack on the same turn, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength save or be knocked prone.
description | Fortification Breaker | Deals double damage to objects and structures.
description | Heavy Warhammer | +5 to hit, 1d10+3 bludgeoning.
description | Shield Slam | +5 to hit, 1d6+3 bludgeoning, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength save or be shoved 5 ft.

title: Giant Sand Rhino
contents: subtitle | Large Beast, Stonebreaker War Beast

description | Trampling Charge | If the rhino moves at least 20 ft straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2d6 bludgeoning damage and must succeed on a DC 14 Strength save or be knocked prone.
description | Thick Hide | The rhino reduces nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage it takes by 1.
description | Stomp | +6 to hit, 2d6+4 bludgeoning. Can only target a prone creature.

title: Bletheus
contents: property | Skills | Acrobatics +6, Athletics +3, Perception +5, Stealth +6, Survival +5
description | Flight | Cannot fly while wearing medium or heavy armor.
description | Favored Foe | When Bletheus hits a creature, he can mark it and deal +1d4 damage once per turn.
description | Colossus Slayer | Once per turn deal +1d8 damage to a wounded target.
description | Ostrumite-Core Bow | +8 to hit, 1d8+4 piercing (range 150/600).

title: Fruck
contents: description | Amphibious | The fruck can breathe air and water.
description | Leaping Waddle | The fruck's long jump is up to 20 ft and high jump is up to 10 ft, with or without a running start.

description | Startling Quack | Once per short rest, creatures within 10 ft that can hear the fruck must succeed on a DC 11 Wis save or have disadvantage on the next attack roll they make before the end of their next turn.
description | Tongue Lash | +4 to hit, 1d4+2 bludgeoning, reach 10 ft. On hit, Medium or smaller target must succeed on a DC 11 Str save or be pulled 5 ft toward the fruck.
description | Muddy Splash (Recharge 5-6) | 10 ft cone, creatures in the area must succeed on a DC 12 Dex save or take 2d4 bludgeoning and be blinded by mud until the start of their next turn.

title: Mercenary Captain
contents: description | Ruthless Commander | When an allied mercenary within 10 ft hits a creature, the captain gains advantage on its next attack against that same creature.
description | Multiattack | The captain makes two battleaxe attacks.
description | Throwing Axe | +5 to hit, 1d6+3 slashing, range 20/60.

title: Mercenary Cutthroat
contents: description | Dirty Fighting | Once per turn the cutthroat deals +1d6 damage if an ally is within 5 ft of the target.
description | Throwing Knife | +5 to hit, 1d4+3 piercing, range 20/60.

title: Mercenary Crossbowman
contents: description | Opportunist | The crossbowman has advantage on attacks against creatures that are prone or restrained.
description | Heavy Crossbow | +4 to hit, 1d10+2 piercing.

title: Mercenary Brawler
contents: description | Brutal Swing | When the brawler reduces a creature to 0 HP it may move 10 ft.
description | Grapple | +5 Athletics check to grapple a target.
